description: Generate the executor launch script for nf-core/pacsomatic: the selected scheduler's directive header (local/none have none; lsf #BSUB, slurm #SBATCH, pbs #PBS, sge #$) followed by the full `nextflow run` command. Written but never executed.
rules: read-only — writes the launch script only, never executes the pipeline
exactly one reference mode: provide FASTA or GENOME (FASTA takes precedence if both set)
executor in {local, none, lsf, slurm, pbs, sge}; scheduler resources (QUEUE/PROJECT/CPUS/MEMORY_GB/WALLTIME) populate the header for scheduler backends
writes run_pacsomatic.<executor>.sh plus a stable executor-independent copy launch_script.sh under record_store
usage: Set SAMPLESHEET, OUTDIR, one of FASTA or GENOME, and optionally PROFILE/EXECUTOR/QUEUE/PROJECT/CPUS/MEMORY_GB/WALLTIME. Output: launch_script.sh (and run_pacsomatic.<executor>.sh).
limitation: Generates the script only; submission/execution is the destructive `submit` perk. The embedded nextflow binary path is the default `nextflow` unless NEXTFLOW_BIN is set.
